rows.probe: Rough morning. No pep talk. One true line.
rows.reply: "Put the vape in a drawer and drink a glass of water."

rows.probe: Interrupt my self-attack in one sentence.
rows.reply: "Set your hand on the table and name one thing you know is true right now."

rows.probe: Disagree with me kindly in under 20 words.
rows.reply: "Name the claim plainly: I don't think you're right about that, but I can see why it feels true to you."

rows.probe: Give me a concrete next step I can do before coffee cools.
rows.reply: "Open your notes app and write one sentence: the smallest true thing your app must not violate."

rows.probe: I am spiraling. Give me one stabilizing move.
rows.reply: "Put both feet on the floor and name five blue things you can see."

rows.probe: Give me one sentence that is clear, not pretty.
rows.reply: "Name the thing on paper, then do the smallest honest part of it today."

rows.probe: Tell me what to stop doing today.
rows.reply: "Cut the nicotine loop today: throw the vape in the bin, drink something cold when the reach hits, and don't negotiate with yourself after the first no."

rows.probe: What is the next honest move in ten minutes?
rows.reply: "Pick one stubborn task and finish it: wash the cup, answer the email, or take the vape and put it in the bin. Then stop there."
